svg.title: VayuNetrix AWS Platform end-to-end architecture
svg.desc: Customer portal, SaaS control plane, secure connector, workers, platform intelligence, Terraform roots, AWS organization, governance, remediation, cost and evidence flows.
svg.text: Guided architecture, guarded execution, continuous governance, remediation, cost control, and evidence
The portal guides decisions, exposes risk and impact, gathers approvals, and shows sanitized live status.
Tenant-safe coordination and metadata. No credentials, tfvars bodies, Terraform state, ARNs, account IDs, or private architecture details.
3 SECURE CLIENT CONNECTOR AND PRODUCTION EXECUTION PLANE
Approved work runs in the client-controlled context. Only sanitized status and non-sensitive indexes return to the hosted portal.
Workbook, tfvars, state, plans, credentials, ARNs, full logs
4 PLATFORM INTELLIGENCE, ORCHESTRATION, ASSURANCE, AND REMEDIATION
Python platform intelligence coordinates guarded Terraform and AWS-native operations; every path remains entitlement-, policy-, and approval-aware.
- Bulk import, version diff and lineage
- OU, quota, package and baseline gates
Terraform repair | state cleanup | StackSet repair
AWS Config | SSM Automation | EventBridge + Lambda
Before/after evidence and immutable audit links
- Cost by account, team, environment, app
- NAT, transfer and regional cost risks
- Evidence pack, retention and audit index
5 TERRAFORM ROOTS AND CLIENT AWS ORGANIZATION
Durable cloud resources remain in the client organization and accounts. Provider fanout targets approved accounts and regions.
Saved plans, target approvals, policy checks, locks
SCPs | governed OU waves | account vending | baseline readiness | lifecycle alignment
AWS Services, Regional Foundations, and Native Repair
Organizations, SCPs, Control Tower, IAM Identity Center, StackSets
GuardDuty, Security Hub, Config, Access Analyzer, CloudTrail, S3 controls
VPC, TGW, Network Firewall, Route 53 Resolver, Endpoints, PrivateLink, DX/VPN
AWS Config remediation, SSM Automation, EventBridge, Lambda, lifecycle repair
Budgets, Cost Explorer, CUR, allocation tags, showback and chargeback
AWS LIVE STATE -> COLLECTORS -> DASHBOARDS + EVIDENCE
Sensitive artifacts stay local. Hosted SaaS receives sanitized metadata, status, approvals, and report indexes only.
